title: Investigating Variation in Replicability: A "Many Labs" Replication Project
version_note: Social Psychology 45(3):142-152, 2014. Distributed under the Hogrefe OpenMind License (open access). Full text read this session from the openly hosted PDF (stanford.edu/~knutson/jdm/klein14.pdf); the abstract, Table 2 and the 'Variation Across Samples and Settings' section were read directly, so linked evidence is fulltext_direct and publishable.
